message:
Running command: # Two issues:
# 1. IP paths don't exist - /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/ is missing
# 2. SKIP_STEPS is not a valid key in this version of librelane
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/ 2>/dev/null || echo "ip/ directory missing"
echo "---"
# Check if IPs are somewhere else
find /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526 -name "nc_xip.v" 2>/dev/null | head -5
find /nc -name "nc_xip.v" 2>/dev/null | head -5
